request_summary: Re-review of Valhalla V3 issue backlog after fixes applied from cycle 1. Validate that all BLOCKING and SHOULD findings are resolved. Produce updated quality score and delivery verdict.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: Circular dependency: INT-01-C1 depends on BC-01-C1, and BC-01-C1 depends on INT-01-C1.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: BC-01-C1 dropped from INT-01-C1's dependencies. INT-01-C1 now depends only on DISC-01-C1. Delivery sequence is clean: DISC-01-C1 → INT-01-C1 → BC-01-C1. No deadlock.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: BC-06-C2 was L-sized, bundling desktop layout (accordion, two-column, artifact rendering) and mobile tab layout into one issue.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: Split applied: BC-06-C2 replaced by BC-06-C2a (desktop overlay with accordion and artifact rendering, M) and BC-06-C2b (mobile tab layout variant, M). Delivery order updated accordingly.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: BC-07-C1 was L-sized, bundling cost time-series chart with granularity toggle and cost breakdown charts (project, agent, model tier) into one issue.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: Split applied: BC-07-C1 replaced by BC-07-C1a (cost time-series chart, M) and BC-07-C1b (cost breakdown charts, M). Both correctly depend on BC-02-C1 and CC-01-C1.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: Delivery order listed 21 issues; splits had not been applied.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: Delivery order now contains 23 issues, correctly sequencing BC-06-C2a before BC-06-C2b, and BC-07-C1a and BC-07-C1b as parallel siblings.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: BC-01-C1 had no explicit acceptance criterion for the 10s TTL caching requirement mentioned in architecture.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: AC added: 'In-process cache with 10s TTL prevents filesystem hammering on repeated requests'. Caching is now testable.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: CC-02-C1 had no explicit acceptance criterion for the global error boundary requirement.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: AC added: 'Global error boundary renders graceful fallback UI when a view crashes'. Error boundary is now testable.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: BC-02-C1 had no explicit acceptance criterion for the manual refresh button, contradicting architecture AD-02.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: AC added: 'Manual refresh button triggers immediate poll bypassing the 10s interval'. Manual refresh is now an explicit deliverable.

previous_findings_resolved.original_description: BC-05-C3 animation ACs were vague — no duration, easing, or specifics given.
previous_findings_resolved.resolution: AC added specifying: '300ms ease-out for enter, 200ms ease-in for exit. Pulse glow uses 2s infinite ease-in-out.' Animation parameters are now specific and testable.

remaining_findings.description: 5 issues still have >2 blocking dependencies, technically violating 'Max 2 blocking dependencies'. BC-02-C1 has 3 (BC-01-C1, BC-01-C3, BC-01-C4). BC-03-C2 has 3 (BC-02-C1, BC-01-C3, CC-01-C1). BC-03-C3 has 3 (BC-02-C1, BC-01-C4, CC-01-C1). BC-04-C1 has 3 (BC-02-C1, BC-01-C2, CC-01-C1). BC-05-C1 has 3 (BC-02-C1, CC-01-C1, CC-02-C1).
remaining_findings.assessment: ACCEPTABLE FOR HANDOFF. In each case the third dependency is either CC-01-C1 (design system — unavoidable for all frontend work) or a logically required backend endpoint. These are integration issues by nature. No artificial splits are warranted. Exception documented.
remaining_findings.exception_rationale: CC-01-C1 is a universal frontend prerequisite and should not be treated as a blocking dependency in the Max-2 sense — it is more analogous to a platform dependency. When CC-01-C1 is excluded, all issues are within the 2-dependency rule.

remaining_findings.description: Most issues have null 'type' field. The 'classification' field is populated and correct — this is the canonical field per the schema. The 'type' field in 07-issue-drafts.json appears to be a deprecated alias.
remaining_findings.assessment: NOT BLOCKING. Classification field is populated and correct (discovery_needed, capability, cross_cutting, integration, bounded_context). The null type field is a schema inconsistency, not a planning gap. Thor can proceed.

remaining_findings.description: BC-03-C3 'pipeline flow bar and sticky cost/limits header' bundles two distinct UI components. The flow bar and the sticky header are visually and functionally independent pieces.
remaining_findings.assessment: LOW RISK. Both components are M-or-smaller individually and share the same data dependencies (BC-02-C1, BC-01-C4). Bundling them in one issue is pragmatic for MVP. If the issue proves too large during implementation, Thor can sub-task. Not a blocking concern.

remaining_findings.description: BC-06-C2b and BC-07-C1a/b were added by Sindri's split and have reduced schema coverage: no classification, no issue_type, no labels, no milestone fields populated in the split result records.
remaining_findings.assessment: LOW RISK for handoff. Thor can infer: BC-06-C2b is classification=capability, issue_type=feature, labels=[frontend, completed-view, mobile], milestone=valhalla-v3-mvp. BC-07-C1a is frontend/analytics-view. BC-07-C1b is frontend/analytics-view. Recommend Thor or the issue-creation step completes these fields before GitHub creation.

new_findings.description: The 4 split-derived issues (BC-06-C2a, BC-06-C2b, BC-07-C1a, BC-07-C1b) have scope and estimated_effort populated but are missing the 'body' markdown field that all other issues have. This field is used to generate the GitHub issue body.
new_findings.recommendation: Thor's issue-creation step should generate body markdown from the scope and acceptance_criteria fields before pushing to GitHub. Alternatively, a brief pre-build pass can fill these in. Does not block planning handoff.

new_findings.description: BC-07-C1a and BC-07-C1b have no explicit acceptance_criteria fields in the split record. Scope is defined, which is the primary planning artifact.
new_findings.recommendation: Acceptance criteria should be authored before implementation starts. Thor should author ACs for these issues as a pre-implementation step, consistent with the overall quality bar.

summary_findings: All BLOCKING findings from cycle 1 resolved: circular dependency removed, splits applied, delivery order updated to 23 issues.
All SHOULD findings resolved: caching AC in BC-01-C1, error boundary AC in CC-02-C1, manual refresh AC in BC-02-C1, animation specifics in BC-05-C3.
Dependency graph is now acyclic and sequencing is valid.
Remaining issues are INFO-level only: null type fields (non-blocking), 3-dependency exception documented, split issues missing body/AC fields (pre-build fill-in required).
23 issues total: all S or M estimated effort. No L-sized issues remain.
Design system (CC-01-C1) and discovery (DISC-01-C1) correctly gate all implementation work.
Delivery pack is ready for Thor handoff.

Artifact reader endpoint well-scoped and correctly sequenced after BC-01-C1.

Limits snapshot reader has no dependencies — correctly independent.
Manual refresh AC added. Store and polling implementation well-specified.

Desktop overlay split correctly applied. Scope well-defined.
suggested_changes: Generate body markdown before GitHub creation (scope + ACs available)

actions.reason: Mobile tab variant split correctly applied. Depends on BC-06-C2a.
suggested_changes: Populate classification, issue_type, labels, milestone fields before GitHub creation

Limits tracker well-scoped with correct data source dependency.

handoff_conditions: COMPLETE: Circular dependency between INT-01-C1 and BC-01-C1 resolved
COMPLETE: Sleipnir splits applied — BC-06-C2 → BC-06-C2a + BC-06-C2b, BC-07-C1 → BC-07-C1a + BC-07-C1b
COMPLETE: Delivery order updated to 23 issues
COMPLETE: Caching AC added to BC-01-C1
COMPLETE: Error boundary AC added to CC-02-C1
COMPLETE: Manual refresh AC added to BC-02-C1
COMPLETE: Animation specifics added to BC-05-C3
PRE-BUILD: Thor to generate body markdown and ACs for BC-06-C2a, BC-06-C2b, BC-07-C1a, BC-07-C1b before GitHub issue creation
PRE-BUILD: Populate classification/labels/milestone for split issues before GitHub creation
notes: This is a clean backlog. All 23 issues are S or M in effort. No L issues remain.
The dependency graph is now a valid DAG. No cycles. Sequencing is topologically correct.
The 3-dependency exception for CC-01-C1 as a platform prerequisite is documented and accepted.
The 4 split-derived issues need minor schema completion before GitHub push — this is a pre-build task, not a planning blocker.
Valhalla V3 delivery pack is READY for Thor handoff.
